elements.text:
作る前に
型を選ぶ
それだけで、AIの迷いと崩れを大きく減らせます。

elements.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none" stroke="#2f6fb3" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M10 3l1.6 4.4L16 9l-4.4 1.6L10 15l-1.6-4.4L4 9l4.4-1.6L10 3Z" /></svg>

slides.title: PPT作成は4ステップに圧縮する

elements.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 960 540" role="img"><title>4ステップでPPTXへ</title><desc>flow schematic for a contextual pptcreater sample deck, generated from safe presets.</desc><rect width="960" height="540" fill="#fbfaf7" /><text x="48" y="58" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" font-weight="700" fill="#1f2933">4ステップでPPTXへ</text><rect x="48" y="84" width="70" height="4" rx="2" fill="#315f9f" /><rect x="48" y="210" width="198" height="96" rx="18" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><circle stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" /><rect x="270" y="210" width="198" height="96" rx="18" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><circle cx="304" cy="244" r="14" fill="#dfe8f5" stroke="#315f9f" /><text x="304" y="249" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#315f9f">2</text><text x="330" y="246" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="#1f2933">pattern</text><path d="M476 258h8m-8-8 8 8-8 8" fill="none" stroke="#315f9f" stroke-width="3" elements.longDescription: flow schematic for a contextual pptcreater sample deck, generated from safe presets.

slides.title: 伝えることは3つに絞る

elements.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 960 540" role="img"><title>伝える3ポイント</title><desc>list-horizontal schematic for a contextual pptcreater sample deck, generated from safe presets.</desc><rect width="960" height="540" fill="#fbfaf7" /><text x="48" y="58" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" font-weight="700" fill="#1f2933">伝える3ポイント</text><rect x="48" y="84" width="70" height="4" rx="2" fill="#315f9f" /><rect x="48" y="205" width="276" height="138" rx="22" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><circle cx="186" cy="184" r="18" fill="#315f9f" /><text x="186" y="190" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#fbfaf7">1</text><text x="186" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="#1f2933">迷わない</text><rect x="342" y="205" width="276" height="138" rx="22" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><circle cx="480" cy="184" r="18" fill="#315f9f" /><text x="480" y="190" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#fbfaf7">2</text><text x="480" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="#1f2933">崩れない</text><rect x="636" y="205" width="276" height="138" rx="22" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d8d3c8" /><circle cx="774" cy="184" r="18" fill="#315f9f" /><text x="774" y="190" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#fbfaf7">3</text><text x="774" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="#1f2933">再利用できる</text></svg>
elements.longDescription: list-horizontal schematic for a contextual pptcreater sample deck, generated from safe presets.

slides.title: 生成後に確認してから渡す

elements.text:
生成後に
確認してから渡す
lint と render warning を公開前のチェックポイントにします。

elements.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="none" stroke="#2f6fb3" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M10 3l1.6 4.4L16 9l-4.4 1.6L10 15l-1.6-4.4L4 9l4.4-1.6L10 3Z" /></svg>

sources.title: Slideland reference categories
sources.notes: Uses Slideland categories as inspiration only; visuals are generated by pptcreater presets.
